## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Webflow's strategy, team structure, and potential SEO opportunities with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webflow is cautious about AI-generated website builders potentially disrupting their visual editor value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Developers.webflow.com is a key focus area for improvement and expansion in the coming months](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [growthx.ai will present ideas for driving awareness around headless CMS and potentially MCP server capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Kirat owns marketplace projects and developers.webflow.com; university is a separate team](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Topics

### Webflow's Competitive Landscape

  - [Concern about bottom-up disruption from AI-generated website builders like Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Webflow started in a similar space as Squarespace, targeting beginners](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Questions about where users "graduate" to after outgrowing AI-generated solutions](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Stackable and Bolt (growthx.ai customers) experiencing rapid growth but uncertain long-term strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Webflow Team Structure and Properties

  - [University team is separate, manages its own content and production](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Marketplace team (under Kirat) handles supply, templates, pricing, and behavior](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Marketing team owns SEO for marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Developers.webflow.com is owned by Kirat's team (Anushree)](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Integration pages on university site are outdated and can be moved](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### SEO Strategy and Collaboration

  - [growthx.ai to focus on developers.webflow.com for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Potential to expand into headless CMS and MCP server-related content](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Need to balance efforts with existing marketing team and agency relationships](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Aim to show tangible impact within 2-3 months (e.g., increased pages, improved rankings)](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### MCP Server and AI Initiatives

  - [Webflow is developing MCP server capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Opportunity to create content around use cases and be early in the space](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Instrumented to track professional usage for gathering case studies](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)

### Documentation Site Structure

  - [Need to plan thoughtful structure for new content to avoid "spaghetti" organization](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Balance between technical documentation and SEO-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to present ideas for driving awareness around headless CMS and MCP server capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Develop a clear reporting structure for SEO efforts (baseline metrics, bets made, progress over time)](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating MCP server-related content on the documentation site](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Review and potentially restructure the documentation site for better organization](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Continue focus on developers.webflow.com improvements and expansion](https://fathom.video/share/yiRHKy68UniYiPUjnuH-Cu3xvcFUoo6y?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
